name: Memory (Infino)
description: Infino-backed long-term memory for OpenClaw — hybrid (BM25 + vector) recall on object storage.

embedding.provider.label: Embedding Provider
embedding.provider.help: Embedding provider to use (for example openai or ollama)

embedding.dimensions.label: Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Vector dimensions (required for non-OpenAI models); infino requires 16-4096

embedding.apiKey.label: Embedding API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: Optional API key for OpenAI-compatible embeddings; omit for local providers

embedding.baseUrl.label: Base URL
embedding.baseUrl.help: Optional embedding endpoint base URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:11434 for Ollama)

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Local path or s3://|gs://|az:// URI for the memory catalog

nCent.label: IVF Centroids
nCent.help: Vector index centroid count; 1 = exact (right for memory-scale stores)

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

storageOptions.label: Storage Options
storageOptions.help: S3-compatible storage options (endpoint, access_key, secret_key); supports ${ENV_VAR} values
